title: NAS油条整合汉化
description: 一个整合了上千个模组的中文汉化材质包，让更多的模组有简体中文汉化。
body:
![标题](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06df2092311542237d6fa5fa9e4dc28b27f79c6a_0.webp)

A Chinese localization package integrating thousands of modules is mainly in version 1.21.x, and most of the contents come from the Internet and the author's homemade localization and AI translation localization.

一个整合上千个模组的中文汉化包
主要为1.21.x版本的汉化
汉化内容大部分来自互联网
以及作者的自制汉化与AI翻译汉化
